annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under C.R.S. §5-12-102(4)(b): 8% per annum COMPOUNDED ANNUALLY on general money judgments absent a contract rate. Personal-injury/tort judgments use a separate rate under §13-21-101, and appealed money judgments a variable rate under §5-12-106 (certified each January 1 by the Colorado Secretary of State). Verify the current variable rates at coloradosos.gov; not legal advice.
